tools.name: clinic_info
tools.description: Overview of the clinic: who they are, what they specialise in, NAP, hours and rating.

tools.name: list_treatments
tools.description: List the dental treatments offered, with a short summary and page URL for each.

tools.name: get_treatment
tools.description: Full details and FAQs for one treatment. Use a slug from list_treatments() (e.g. 'dentalimplants').

tools.name: location_and_hours
tools.description: Where the clinic is, how to find it on a map, the area it serves, and its opening hours.

tools.name: contact_and_booking
tools.description: Phone numbers, email and how to book a consultation.

tools.name: about_dentist
tools.description: About Dr Roshini Shetty, the lead dentist.

tools.name: oral_health_articles
tools.description: The clinic's oral-health blog: evidence-based articles on teeth and gum health.

tools.name: faqs
tools.description: Common questions and answers about the clinic and basal implants.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_treatments · Private data: contact_and_booking · Public sink: contact_and_booking.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_treatments · Private data: contact_and_booking · Public sink: contact_and_booking

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
